idea-plugin.name: DevoxxGenie
idea-plugin.description:
Devoxx Genie - Your AI-powered coding assistant for IntelliJ IDEA

📖 Full Documentation at genie.devoxx.com

Key Features

  • Local & Cloud LLMs: Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Llama.cpp, Exo + OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Mistral, Groq, DeepInfra, DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, OpenRouter, Azure OpenAI, Amazon Bedrock
  • Agent Mode: Autonomous code tools with parallel sub-agents, multi-turn tool use, and built-in file/search/run_command tools
  • Skills (new in v1.5.0): Portable SKILL.md files the LLM activates mid-conversation — the same files also work in Claude Code, Codex and Gemini
  • Commands: User-defined slash commands (previously "Custom Prompts") for reusable prompt templates
  • MCP Support: Model Context Protocol with integrated marketplace for installing servers (stdio and HTTP/SSE transports)
  • Spec Driven Development: Backlog.md task management with Spec Browser, Kanban Board, and Agent Loop batch execution with dependency ordering
  • Security Scanning: Run Gitleaks (secrets), OpenGrep (SAST) and Trivy (CVEs) as agent tools — findings auto-create prioritised backlog tasks
  • Inline Code Completion: AI-powered suggestions as you type using Fill-in-the-Middle models via Ollama or LM Studio
  • ACP & CLI Runners: Integrate external agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Kimi, Copilot) via the Agent Communication Protocol or CLI invocation
  • RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for semantic code search (ChromaDB + Ollama embeddings)
  • Web Search: Integrate Google and Tavily search into your prompts
  • Plugin Integration API: Other IntelliJ plugins can send findings to DevoxxGenie at runtime via a reflection-based ExternalPromptService
  • Chat History: Locally stored conversations (SQLite) with parallel conversation tabs
  • Token Cost Calculator: Real-time cost and context-window estimation for cloud providers
  • Multi-modal Support: Drag & drop images for vision models, plus Git diff and project-context attachments
  • Docker Agentic Platform: CLI integration (preview)

Quick Start

  • Install the plugin
  • For local LLMs: install Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Llama.cpp or Exo
  • For cloud LLMs: add your API keys in Settings → DevoxxGenie → LLM Providers
  • Optional: enable Agent Mode, configure MCP servers from the marketplace, or drop a SKILL.md into .devoxxgenie/skills/, .claude/skills/ or .agents/skills/
  • Start prompting!

Need help? Visit our Getting Started Guide or check the Troubleshooting page.

Privacy & Anonymous Usage Analytics

To guide which LLM providers and models receive engineering investment, DevoxxGenie collects anonymous usage data when you run a prompt or change models.

What is sent:

  • An anonymous install ID (UUID), generated once and stored locally
  • A per-launch session ID (random 10-digit number)
  • Plugin version and IDE version
  • LLM provider name (e.g. anthropic, ollama)
  • LLM model name (e.g. claude-3-5-sonnet)
  • Which optional features are enabled (RAG, Agent mode, MCP, Web Search, streaming) and coarse counts such as the number of configured MCP servers or custom prompts — never server names, URLs, commands, or user-defined prompt names
  • Which features are actually used during a prompt (RAG, Agent, MCP, Web Search, project context, custom prompts) — feature identifiers only, never prompt text or file content

What is never sent: prompt text, response text, conversation history, file content, file paths, project names, git remotes, API keys, credentials, token counts, cost data, MCP server names/URLs/commands, or user-defined custom prompt names.

A first-launch notification asks for your consent before any data is sent. You can change this any time in Settings → DevoxxGenie → Analytics.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.9.1

  • fix(debug): Raw Request/Response Logging now also captures traffic for Ollama streaming, Mistral and Amazon Bedrock — these providers previously showed no [RAW] entries in the Activity Log (#1202)
  • feat(debug): the Debug settings page now also hosts the "Enable MCP Logging" and "Enable agent debug logs" toggles, so every debug log option lives in one place (#1202)
  • fix(settings): enabling debug logging from the MCP or Agent Mode settings page now actually opens the Activity Log tool window instead of silently doing nothing (#1202)

v1.9.0

  • feat(debug): new opt-in Raw Request/Response viewer (Settings → DevoxxGenie → Debug) shows the full LLM request and response — messages, tool calls, token usage — in the Activity Log tool window, with a "Show Raw Only" filter, JSON view and copy-all for bug reports; secrets are redacted (#1197, #1198)
  • fix(customopenai): the configured Custom OpenAI context window is now honoured instead of the 4096 default, so the conversation footer no longer reports a 4K window and a red "context exceeded" bar; applying settings also no longer silently switches your selected model (#1201)
  • chore(deps): upgrade Langchain4J to 1.17.2, AWS SDK to 2.47.0 and Netty to 4.2.16.Final (#1191)

v1.8.14

  • feat(settings): saving LLM settings is now blocked when an enabled cloud provider has no API key — the Settings dialog shows a clear error instead of persisting a half-configured provider (#1196)
  • fix(agent): dangling tool_calls no longer corrupt agent conversations — tool-name/argument errors are returned to the model as tool results, and chat memory self-heals before each new prompt (#1194)
  • fix(providers): submitting a prompt with a cloud provider that has no API key configured shows a friendly notification pointing to Settings instead of an IDE error (#1195)

v1.8.13

  • feat(customopenai): configurable context window and input/output cost for the Custom OpenAI provider — the token-usage bar reflects the real window (no more false "context exceeded" warning) and configured costs show in each response bubble (#1187)
  • fix(agent): agent tool-call limits above 100 are now respected — runs no longer die at tool call 100 with "exceeded 100 tool calling round trips" (#1188)

v1.8.12

  • feat(thinking): new opt-in "Show Thinking" setting renders a reasoning model's chain of thought in a dedicated bubble above the answer, in both streaming and non-streaming mode — across OpenAI-compatible providers and Mistral (#1181)
  • fix(models): after an IDE restart, the restored provider no longer shows a foreign provider's model (e.g. Ollama selected with an Anthropic model) (#1184)
  • fix(providers): OpenAI-compatible models that return null text (some reasoning models, or empty replies after tool edits) no longer drop the reply, corrupt history, or crash on reopen (#1182)
  • fix(history): a conversation is now saved to history even when a run fails after the answer has already streamed (#1177)
  • fix(shutdown): guard against a null Application during JVM exit so the thread-pool shutdown hook no longer NPEs (#1178)
  • chore(deps): AWS SDK BOM 2.46.19 → 2.46.20 (#1180)

v1.8.11

  • feat(nvidia): add NVIDIA NIM as a cloud LLM provider — one free nvapi key unlocks 100+ OpenAI-compatible models, fetched live from build.nvidia.com (#1171)
  • feat(ui): the model dropdown is now type-to-filter, so you can narrow a 100+ model list by typing (#1172)
  • feat(skills): add NVIDIA Build Skills to the "Browse skills online" links (#1174)
  • fix(customopenai): selecting CustomOpenAI with a slow/unreachable URL no longer freezes the IDE, and the selected model is restored on restart (#1169)
  • fix(providers): ACP Runners / CLI Runners now appear in the provider dropdown only when a corresponding tool is enabled (#1173)
  • chore(deps): Langchain4J 1.17.0 → 1.17.1 and assorted dependency bumps (#1170)

v1.8.10

  • feat(skills): new "Browse skills online" section in Skills settings with curated links (Anthropic Skills, agentskills.io, Claude Code Marketplace, SkillsMP) for finding and downloading SKILL.md skills (#1168)
  • feat(agent): raise the agent max tool-calls ceiling to 500 and the default to 50, so discovery + implementation on large codebases no longer stalls mid-run (#1163)
  • fix(agent): enabling both a built-in tool and an MCP tool of the same name (e.g. read_file) no longer crashes the agent — the enabled MCP tool now wins (#1159)
  • fix(agent): a non-zero run_command exit is now shown with a red ✗ in the Activity panel instead of a green ✓ (#1164)
  • refactor(models): remove deprecated OpenAI models (GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-3.5 Turbo) in favour of the GPT-4.1 family
  • chore(deps): Langchain4J 1.16.3 → 1.17.0 and assorted dependency bumps (#1161, #1162, #1166)

v1.8.9

  • fix(chat): the Compose chat no longer crashes with NoSuchMethodError after MCP or streamed responses — the markdown renderer is pinned to a coroutines-compatible version (#1158)
  • fix(mcp): HTTP SSE MCP servers (e.g. the JetBrains built-in MCP server) now connect correctly — "Test Connection" and tool calls use the SSE transport instead of failing with a 405 (#1151)
  • fix(cost): agent runs no longer abort with a NullPointerException when a provider returns null token counts (#1149)

v1.8.8

  • fix(edit): the agent's edit tool now matches multiline old_string blocks on Windows (CRLF) files — multi-line edits no longer fail with "The specified old_string was not found" (#1144)

v1.8.7

  • feat(logs): inspect the exact system prompt each chat sends to the model — shown once per conversation as [SYSTEM PROMPT] in the inline Activity panel (full, untruncated) and as 📋 System prompt in the always-available DevoxxGenie Logs panel (#1138)
  • fix(storage): closing two chats at almost the same moment no longer drops a conversation — conversation storage is now a real singleton with SQLite WAL mode, a busy timeout, and serialized writes (#1140)
  • fix(chat): scrolling up in the chat no longer teleports the viewport to the top or to the start of an assistant message (#1139)
  • fix(webserver): replaced the embedded web server's bundled-Netty internals with the JDK HttpServer, removing all Plugin Verifier internal-API warnings (#1141)

v1.8.6

  • feat(welcome): the Welcome screen now nudges you to set up skills and/or MCP servers when none are configured, with "Add Skill" / "Add MCP" buttons that open the right settings panel (#1130)
  • fix(skills): skill-backed agent tools (e.g. activate_skill) no longer fail with "executeWithContext must be called instead" — tool wrappers now honor langchain4j's context-aware executor contract (#1135)
  • fix(mcp-marketplace): the MCP Marketplace dialog no longer hangs on open — it pages the registry lazily with "Load More", searches server-side, and the Cancel button works again (#1128)
  • fix(mcp): the STDIO "Test Connection" in the Add MCP Server dialog now uses your entered environment variables, so servers that need env tokens can be tested and added (#1137)
  • build(deps): bump langchain4j 1.16.2 → 1.16.3, Kotlin 2.2.20 → 2.4.0, and AWS SDK BOM (#1125)

v1.8.5

  • feat(ui): a persistent "Context window: used / max (pct%)" indicator with a colored bar under the prompt shows how much of the model's context the conversation is using, and warns near overflow (#1126)
  • fix(streaming): streaming responses now report token usage and cost — previously the default streaming path recorded no token metrics (#1126)
  • refactor(ui): the AI bubble token line is now clearer — labelled input/output with abbreviated counts (e.g. 10.5K in / 179 out) and locale-stable formatting (#1127)

v1.8.4

  • fix(cli-runner): CLI Runner (Copilot, Claude, …) edits now show up in open editors immediately — the VFS is refreshed when the external process finishes (#1119)
  • fix(settings): the DevoxxGenie LLM settings panel no longer overflows the dialog width when a long API key is stored, so input borders stay visible (#1121)
  • fix(devoxxgenie-md): DEVOXXGENIE.md generation no longer hangs — the Tree depth setting is honored, generation is cancellable, and project analysis is much faster (#1122)
  • refactor(quality): SonarQube code-quality fixes across providers and services (#1120)

v1.8.3

  • feat(welcome): the welcome screen now leads with Latest from the Blog, and Explore Features is collapsible (collapsed by default) so the chip grid no longer dominates the page (#1118)
  • feat(ui): zoom the chat output font with Cmd +/- (macOS) or Ctrl +/- (Windows/Linux) — scales prose and code together and persists across restarts (task-237, #1113)
  • fix(customopenai): send a valid model name (override → selected model → "default") so servers stop rejecting requests, and populate the model picker from the server's /models endpoint (#1116)

v1.8.2

  • feat(ui): live agent activity timeline — per-tool status rows (spinner/✓/✗/⏸), an always-on live status line in the AI bubble, and nested sub-agent rows (task-233, #1109)
  • feat(ui): explicit terminal states in chat — stopped marker, inline error card with Retry, and a max-tool-calls notice (task-234, #1107)
  • feat(ui): chat input/output text scales live with the IDE Zoom (Appearance) factor (task-237, #1106)
  • feat(ui): UI transitions and micro-animations — Welcome↔Chat crossfade, message-entrance and submit-glow polish (task-235, #1105)
  • feat(ui): long-running feedback — elapsed ticker on running tools, determinate cancellable RAG indexing, and undo-deferred history deletion (task-236, #1110)
  • feat(streaming): batched token updates with a blinking caret, tail-follow and a scroll-to-bottom button for smoother streaming (task-232, #1104)
  • fix(settings): open DevoxxGenie settings without blocking the EDT — fixes the intermittent PyCharm crash on opening settings (task-238, #1108)

v1.8.1

  • fix(agent): agent mode no longer crashes on non-Java IDEs (PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, …) — the Java-only PSI navigation tools are now skipped when the IntelliJ Java plugin is absent, instead of throwing NoClassDefFoundError (#1100)

v1.8.0

  • feat(tips): rotating tip line under the prompt input, fetched from a remotely-updatable, 24h-cached tips.json with an offline fallback of 28 tips (#1099)
  • refactor: replace deprecated future-removal APIs across agent, MCP, PSI and theme utilities — no behavior change (4c9b5ac)

v1.7.4

  • fix(credentials): don't read API keys from the OS keychain at IDE startup — provider availability now derives from the non-secret enabled flags, so macOS keychain prompts no longer appear on project open; keys are read lazily at prompt time (#1097)
  • chore(models): refresh static models.json from provider sources (#1096)

v1.7.3

  • feat(agent): add PSI call-graph navigation agent tools — call_hierarchy, type_hierarchy and related code-navigation tools (task-229, #1093)
  • feat(agent): fine-grained enable/disable per PSI tool in Settings (task-229, #1093)
  • fix(agent): keep intermediate reasoning and tool steps visible in streaming chat (#1095)
  • fix(agent): gate tool-activity entries in chat output behind the "show tool activity" setting (#1095)
  • build: migrate to platform-bundled Compose and raise minimum IDE to 2025.3.3 (#1089)
  • build: remove duplicate Netty version declaration (#1091)
  • refactor(chatmodel): replace provider switch with EnumMap registry (#1094)

v1.7.2

  • fix(rag): migrate ChromaDB REST client from v1 to v2 API — fixes collection/embedding endpoints for ChromaDB 0.6.x (#1085, #1086)
  • fix(rag): convert Windows volume path for WSL Linux Docker daemon
  • fix(credentials): skip PasswordSafe in headless mode to eliminate repeated OS keychain prompts during plugin build; add empty-read cache to avoid redundant keychain lookups
  • deps: upgrade langchain4j 1.15.0 → 1.16.1 / beta25 → beta26
  • deps: upgrade AWS SDK BOM 2.44.1 → 2.46.6, SQLite 3.53.0.0 → 3.53.2.0, Netty 4.2.13 → 4.2.15, Logback 1.5.32 → 1.5.34, JUnit 6.1.0-RC1 → 6.1.0

v1.7.1

  • feat(agent): add web_search built-in tool to agent mode (task-223, #1079)
  • feat(commands): add /search slash command and remove the obsolete /tdg command (#1079)
  • security: migrate API keys from plaintext settings XML to IntelliJ PasswordSafe (OS keychain) (#1046)
  • security: mark API key getters/setters @Transient so secrets are never re-serialized to XML
  • fix: correct @Transient migration bug, add partial-failure guard and thread safety
  • fix: idempotent migration retry via startup activity with all-or-nothing migration flag
  • fix(websearch): correct Web switch visibility and isModified() for the Web Search toggle (#1078)
  • fix(openai): correct GPT-5.5 temperature validation (#1074, #1075)

v1.7.0

  • feat: add support for IntelliJ 2026.2 EAP
  • feat(rag): semantic_search agent tool + single ragEnabled switch (task-221, task-222)
  • feat(rag): user-configurable directory exclusion list (task-220)
  • fix: stop bundling platform coroutines jar; restore plugin build (#1054)
  • fix: restore IntelliJ 2025.x compatibility
  • Fix/issue 1065 intelij 2026 debugging fails
  • fix: update to gemini-3.1-flash-lite from deprecated gemini-3.1-flash…
  • fix(rag): unblock loading indicator during query expansion

v1.6.0

  • feat(ap): add Docker Agentic Platform CLI integration (preview)
  • Add Gemini 3.5 Flash model to models.json
  • feat: Add copy button to user prompt bubble (#1024)
  • feat: add shell env file and shell selector for run_command tool
  • fix(jan): support Jan v0.8.0 — model list crash and chat hang (#1051)
  • fix: surface multi-line run_command output in agent log preview
  • fix: support CJK characters in chat input field (#1034)

v1.5.0

  • feat: Introduce langchain4j Skills and rename Custom Prompts → Commands (#1040)
  • feat(welcome): show active Skills on the welcome page above Quick Commands (#1041)
  • feat(settings): replace six per-source 'Open folder' buttons with a single button + source dropdown (#1041)
  • feat(skills): scan .claude/skills and .agents/skills alongside .devoxxgenie/skills (#1041)
  • fix: fire onCustomPromptsChanged from SkillsSettingsConfigurable on apply so the welcome page refreshes immediately (#1040)
  • docs: Commands vs Skills blog post, Skills documentation, footnote fixes (#1040)
  • ci: skip claude-review on fork PRs; exclude intel.com from lychee link check

v1.4.5

  • feat: Add copy button to user prompt bubble (#1024)
  • feat: add shell env file and shell selector for run_command tool
  • Add task-211: persistent semantic conversation memory backed by ChromaDB
  • fix: surface multi-line run_command output in agent log preview
  • fix: support CJK characters in chat input field (#1034)
  • fix: destroy process tree in AcpTransport.close() to prevent thread leak
  • fix: revert Compose/Kotlin ecosystem bump that broke the UI

v1.4.4

  • Add task-211: persistent semantic conversation memory backed by ChromaDB
  • feat(welcome): blog feed on welcome screen + friendlier analytics copy
  • fix: revert Compose/Kotlin ecosystem bump that broke the UI
  • fix: restore last selected model state (#1021)
  • fix: correct Devstral 2 model name
  • Fix: apply IDE Editor font to prompt input field

v1.4.3

  • feat(welcome): blog feed on welcome screen + friendlier analytics copy
  • feat(analytics): track feature enablement & usage (task-209)
  • feat(analytics): anonymous LLM provider/model usage analytics
  • feat: add Exo distributed AI cluster as LLM provider
  • fix(analytics): harden offline tracking delivery

v1.4.2

  • feat(analytics): track feature enablement & usage (task-209)
  • feat(analytics): anonymous LLM provider/model usage analytics
  • feat: add Exo distributed AI cluster as LLM provider
  • fix(analytics): harden offline tracking delivery

v1.4.1

  • Update: Upgrade 40 Gradle dependencies including Langchain4J to 1.12.2
  • Update: LLM models.json with latest provider model names (Anthropic 1M context, Grok 4.20, Groq gpt-oss, Bedrock Claude 4.6/4.5/4.1)
  • Fix: Rollback Kotlin/Compose/Skiko to fix Compose UI rendering crash
  • Fix: SafeComposeContainer addNotify ordering for proper native error handling

v1.4.0

  • Feat: Add Exo distributed AI cluster as new local LLM provider — run large AI models across multiple Apple Silicon devices via Thunderbolt (#1002)
  • Feat: Exo auto-discovery of downloaded models from /state API
  • Feat: Automatic Exo instance creation with placement preview across cluster
  • Feat: Background progress bar during Exo model loading with cancellation support
  • Feat: Auto-recovery when Exo instances disconnect or get recycled
  • Feat: Collapsible cluster status panel showing nodes, memory, GPU usage, temperature, and active instance status
  • Fix: MarkdownConversationRenderer missing createConversationJEditorPane method

v1.3.3

  • Fix: Catch NoClassDefFoundError for CompilerTopics in non-Java IDEs (PhpStorm, WebStorm, etc.) (#990)

v1.3.2

  • Feat: Integrate Spec-to-Code panels into main DevoxxGenie tool window (#987)
  • Feat: Force Skiko software rendering on Windows via AppLifecycleListener (#986)
  • Feat: Include archived tasks in backlog duplicate detection (#985)
  • Fix: File attachment double-click not adding file to window context (#988)
  • Fix: Remove flaky OpenRouterChatModelFactory tests
  • Fix: Defensive copy in ProcessedCompletion record constructor
  • Fix: Refactor Kotlin Compose compiler arg filter to use compilerOptions API
  • Refactor: Centralize system prompt construction in ChatMemoryManager
  • Docs: Update FAQ and troubleshooting for automatic Windows software rendering

v1.3.1

  • Feat: Add Bedrock bearer token authentication support
  • Feat: Add 'Force software rendering' setting for Skiko/GPU issues (#981)
  • Fix: Separate Ollama context window override from discovered metadata (#979) — num_ctx is now only sent when explicitly enabled via new setting
  • Fix: Catch Skiko/Direct3D init errors to prevent chat UI crash (#981)
  • Docs: Add troubleshooting guide and FAQ entry for GPU rendering issues (#981)

v1.3.0

  • Feat: Event Automations (BETA) — AI agents triggered by IDE events (file open/save, build failure, test failure, commit, process crash)
  • Feat: Built-in agents for code review, build fix, debug, test generation, and code explanation
  • Feat: Template engine for agent prompts with {{context}}, {{content}}, {{files}}, {{event}}, {{timestamp}}, {{meta.KEY}} variables
  • Feat: Before-commit automation includes full staged diff (before/after content) for line-level review
  • Feat: "More Info" help link in Event Automations settings panel
  • Fix: Event automations ensure tool window is initialized before dispatching prompts
  • Fix: TestExecutionListener uses project-aware overload for correct project in multi-project sessions
  • Fix: CLI runner error message readability on test connection failure (#971)

v1.2.0

  • Feat: Add conversation tabs for parallel model usage across independent chat sessions
  • Feat: Add DevoxxGenie Workshop link to welcome page banner
  • Fix: Update tab name when restoring conversation from history (was staying "New Chat")
  • Fix: Use theme-aware syntax highlighting to prevent invisible mark characters in code blocks
  • Fix: Improve theme change detection using StartupUiUtil.isUnderDarcula() with EDT-safe propagation
  • Fix: Initialize chat memory before restoring conversation from history
  • Fix: Move conversation DB to durable config directory with legacy migration
  • Fix: Persist CLI runner conversations to conversation history
  • Fix: Prevent duplicate response text in Claude CLI runner
  • Fix: Strip ANSI escape codes from CLI test connection errors
  • Fix: Omit top_p parameter for GPT-5 models in OpenAI provider

v1.1.0

  • Build: Raise minimum IDE version to 2025.1, add support up to 2026.1.* (#972, #963)
  • Build: Update Compose Desktop to 1.10.1 and markdown-renderer to 0.39.2
  • Build: Bundle Compose runtime for 251+ IDEs and configurable IDE version property
  • Fix: Adapt markdown renderer API to v0.28.0 breaking changes
  • Fix: Correct markdown renderer exclude group coordinates
  • Fix: Compose runtime packaging for 251+ IDEs
  • Refactor: Remove unused logo rendering from WelcomeScreen
  • Test: Mock LLMModelRegistryService for deterministic cloud factory tests

v1.0.0

  • Feat: Replace JCEF WebView with native Compose Desktop conversation UI (#961)
  • Feat: New Compose UI components — chat bubbles, activity section, thinking indicator, copy button, file references
  • Feat: Enhance Compose UI with dynamic fonts, markdown rendering in user bubbles, and UX polish
  • Fix: Hide loading indicator on successful prompt completion
  • Fix: Restore correct shouldIncludeSystemMessage logic for o1 models
  • Fix: Filter raw JSON from CLI Runner output, show only human-readable text
  • Refactor: Remove JCEF WebView implementation, handlers, templates, and all WebView CSS/JS/HTML resources
  • Refactor: Remove dead code (WelcomeContentService, CodeGeneratorService, NodeProcessorFactory, FillerPanel, HelpPanel)
  • Refactor: Improve thread safety, error handling, and code clarity across prompt strategies and conversation panels

v0.10.2

  • Fix: Agent intermediate reasoning text now reliably appears below "Thinking..." indicator in chat (#958)
  • Test: Comprehensive test suite for unified WebViewActivityHandler (18 tests)

v0.10.1

  • Refactor: Unify MCP and Agent activity logging into single ActivityMessage system (#957)
  • Fix: Show full log text in DevoxxGenie Logs panel with horizontal scrolling (#957)

v0.10.0

  • Feat: Show agent intermediate reasoning messages in chat output panel with markdown rendering
  • Feat: New "Show tool activity in chat output" setting in Agent Mode settings
  • Feat: Preserve agent reasoning text when final AI response is rendered

v0.9.17

  • Feat: Security Scanning feature — Gitleaks (secret detection), OpenGrep (SAST) and Trivy (SCA/CVE) as LLM agent tools (#954)
  • Feat: Dedicated Security Scanning settings panel with per-scanner path browser and Test button (#954)
  • Feat: Security scan findings auto-created as prioritised Backlog.md tasks (#954)
  • Feat: Security Scan toolbar action in Spec Browser (#954)
  • Fix: SonarLint — use explicit assertions instead of implicit no-throw checks (#953)
  • Fix: Backlog task naming prefix normalisation (#952)
  • Fix: WebView aggressive repaint after long idle in CEF pipeline (#808)
  • Chore: add Lychee link checker CI workflow (#950, #951)

v0.9.16

  • Fix: conversation history popup now closes after selecting an old chat (#946)
  • Fix: remove EDT-blocking sleep calls during conversation restoration (#946)
  • Feat: prefer value of num_ctx for context length of Ollama models (#936)

v0.9.15

  • Externalize cloud model config (names, costs, context windows) to remote models.json with 24h TTL caching
  • Refresh button now works for cloud providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, etc.) with model diff notification
  • Token Cost settings table is now read-only and refreshes from remote models.json on open
  • Add Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview model

v0.9.14

  • Compact icon-only toolbar footer: all buttons uniform 28x28 with tooltips, FlowLayout eliminates gaps when buttons are hidden (#941)
  • Distinct folder-with-plus icon for Add Project button to differentiate from Add File
  • Toggleable Add File button in footer via Settings > Token Cost & Context Window
  • Vertically centered Agent/MCP labels in footer right panel
  • Merge Agent and MCP log panels into unified Activity Logs panel (#938)
  • Add "More Info" help links to all settings panels (#940)
  • Refactor: replace unicode escapes with literal characters in AgentMcpLogPanel

v0.9.13

  • Add claude-sonnet-4-6 to Anthropic model selection (#932)
  • Parallel execution for independent tasks in SDD Spec Browser dependency graph (#927)
  • Green parallel Run buttons added to Spec Browser toolbar (#927)
  • Individual and bulk archive/unarchive for done tasks in SDD Spec Browser (#933)
  • Project statistics/overview panel in SDD Spec Browser (#933)
  • Project-wide Definition of Done defaults for SDD backlog (#933)
  • Fuzzy search replaces simple text matching in SDD backlog (#933)
  • Fix: ACP client Set iteration using for-each loop for JsonNode.properties() (#929)
  • Fix: replace deprecated JsonNode.fields() with properties() (#927)
  • Fix: implicit narrowing conversion in compound assignment (security alert)
  • Refactor: ChatModelFactoryProvider made final utility class (#934)

v0.9.12

  • ACP Client rewrite: builder pattern, lifecycle management, configurable timeouts, and typed exception hierarchy
  • Attached files context now included in prompt history for ACP/CLI runners
  • ExternalPromptService: new project service for programmatic prompt submission
  • MCP services refactored for testability with dependency injection
  • JaCoCo code coverage plugin added with proper IntelliJ plugin classloading support
  • Comprehensive test coverage: 2100+ unit tests across services, UI, chatmodel factories, and utilities
  • Fix: resolve jar duplicate entry for kotlin_module
  • Fix: replace deprecated Query.forEach with findAll iteration

v0.9.11

  • PSI Tools: 5 new IDE-powered code intelligence tools for agent mode — find_symbols, document_symbols, find_references, find_definition, find_implementations (#921)
  • Semantic code navigation: agent can jump to definitions, find usages, and discover implementations using IntelliJ's Program Structure Interface
  • PSI tools work across all IDE-supported languages (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, Go, Rust, etc.)
  • New PSI Tools toggle in Agent Settings (enabled by default)

v0.9.10

  • ACP Runners: communicate with external agents (Kimi, Gemini CLI, Kilocode, Claude Code, Copilot) via the Agent Communication Protocol with JSON-RPC 2.0 over stdin/stdout (#920)
  • Conversation history for CLI and ACP runners: prior exchanges are included so the LLM can recall earlier messages
  • Move CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md and DEVOXXGENIE.md content to system prompt (set once per conversation instead of repeated in every user message)
  • Per-tool enable/disable for MCP servers and agent mode built-in tools (#919)
  • New fetch_page built-in agent tool for web page fetching
  • Dedicated CLI/ACP Runners settings page (moved from Spec Driven Development settings)
  • Add Claude and Copilot as ACP tool types with configurable ACP flags

v0.9.9

  • CLI Runners as a chat-mode provider: execute prompts via external CLI tools (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, Kimi) (#916)
  • CLI tool execution for spec tasks: run To Do tasks through CLI runners (#874, #875)
  • Kimi CLI runner with --prompt flag support and --quiet mode for clean output (#875, #916)
  • Refactor CLI runners to dedicated package with Command pattern (GoF) (#874, #875)
  • Fix: defer scrollTo in JCEF WebView to fix auto-scroll after DOM updates (#916)
  • Bump the gradle-dependencies group with 3 updates (#873)

v0.9.8

  • Automated test execution: new run_tests agent tool that auto-detects build systems (Gradle/Maven/npm/Cargo/Go/Make), runs tests, and returns structured results (#863)
  • Agent iterates on test failures: system prompt instructs the LLM to run tests after code changes and fix until they pass
  • Configurable test execution settings: timeout, custom test command with {target} placeholder
  • Agent Loop: batch task execution with dependency-aware ordering, progress tracking, and automatic task advancement (#872)
  • Fix: prevent agent and MCP logs from leaking across projects (#867)
  • Fix: defer task advancement until prompt execution completes (#872)
  • Fix: downgrade Kotlin to 2.0.21 to match IDE runtime
  • Fix: Prompts settings dialog text overflows viewport

v0.9.7

  • Spec Driven Development (SDD) feature with Backlog.md integration, Kanban board, and enhanced Spec Browser (#862)
  • 17 granular backlog tools replacing manage_spec for full CRUD operations on tasks, documents, and milestones
  • Init Backlog button for quick project setup
  • Remove deprecated o1-mini model from OpenAI registry
  • Bump the gradle-dependencies group with 18 updates (#861)

v0.9.6

  • Inline code completion using Fill-in-the-Middle (FIM) models with configurable provider/model settings (#857)
  • Migrate Gradle IntelliJ Plugin from 1.x to 2.x (#858)

v0.9.5

  • Add CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md support: automatically include project instructions in prompts with priority logic (#856, #854)
  • Improve agent logging and MCP tool provider integration (#855)
  • Replace parallelism spinner with dynamic add/remove sub-agent rows (#855)
  • Fix: add null-safety to welcome template rendering with fallback to local content
  • Fix: use correct announcement fields (type/message) in welcome.json

v0.9.4

  • Agent mode with built-in tool execution (read, write, edit, search, list files, run commands) (#849)
  • Parallel sub-agents for concurrent codebase exploration with per-agent LLM configuration (#850)
  • MCP configuration JSON import/export for easy sharing of MCP server setups (#852, #786)
  • Fix: clear selection metadata when removing files from context (#847, #783)
  • Rename Sub-Agents documentation to Agent Mode

v0.9.3

  • Externalize welcome text with remote fetching from genie.devoxx.com
  • Support announcements, dynamic feature lists, and social links without plugin release
  • Add analytics tracking pixel for welcome view metrics via Cloudflare Worker + GA4
  • Schema versioning for remote welcome content with graceful local fallback
  • Replace deprecated URL(String) constructor with java.net.URI in WebViewExternalLinkHandler

v0.9.2

  • Add dedicated Skills settings dialog for custom user-defined skills
  • Add $ARGUMENT placeholder support in custom skill templates
  • Keep Prompts settings focused on system instruction, DEVOXXGENIE.md options, and keyboard shortcuts
  • Show resolved custom skill prompt in user message instead of raw /command
  • Migrate legacy HTTP/SSE MCP transport usage to StreamableHttpMcpTransport
  • Update welcome wording to Skills terminology and highlight MCP Marketplace first
  • Issue #809: Fix LM Studio context length detection to use model metadata instead of defaulting to 8K
  • Issue #809: Add optional LM Studio fallback context setting in the GUI
  • Replace deprecated Project.getBaseDir() with ProjectUtil.guessProjectDir()
  • Replace deprecated NioEventLoopGroup with MultiThreadIoEventLoopGroup for Netty 4.2.x
  • Resolve plugin verifier warnings for experimental and deprecated API usage
  • Add Kotlin K2 plugin mode declaration (supportsKotlinPluginMode)

v0.9.1

  • Issue #791: Fix exception when attaching source code containing triple braces ({{{ }}})
  • Add MCP server marketplace for browsing and installing MCP servers
  • Add location and type filters to the MCP marketplace dialog
  • Add support for custom headers in HTTP MCP transports for authentication
  • Refactor MCP integration to use the official langchain4j-mcp artifact (remove core sub-module)
  • Remove legacy GitHub MCP and FileSystem MCP quick-action buttons from settings

v0.9.0

  • Issue #698: Fix black screen after idle — WebView sleep/wake recovery with proper resource disposal
  • MCP "Test Connection & Fetch Tools" no longer blocks the IDE; runs with cancellable progress dialog and fixes MCP client resource leak on error

v0.8.0

  • Update models for Anthropic, OpenAI and Gemini
  • Add support for MCP streamable HTTP
  • Issue #689: Upgrade to langchain4j 1.10.0(-beta18)
  • Issue #796: Web search doesn't work (null error)
  • Bump the gradle-dependencies

v0.7.1

  • Issue #767: MCP approval timeout should be configurable
  • Issue #771: Enable streaming responses for Bedrock Anthropic models
  • Added Claude Sonnet 4 to the available Amazon Bedrock models
  • Issue #806: Plugin 'DevoxxGenie' (version '0.7.0') is not compatible with the current version of the IDE
  • Bump the gradle-dependencies

v0.7.0

  • Added Claude Sonnet 3.5 v2 to Amazon Bedrock models
  • Added configuration setting to enable/disable regional inference for Amazon Bedrock models (i.e. prefixing model names with 'us', 'eu', or 'apac')
  • Fixed issue where the entire file was added in the context when adding code snippet
  • Fixed fallback for empty submit and newline shortcuts on macOS 15.5 with IntelliJ IDEA 2025.1.3
  • Fixed duplicated user message issue
  • Configure Dependabot for Gradle dependencies
  • Bump the gradle-dependencies group with 22 updates (AWS SDK, Retrofit, SQLite, Docker Java, JTokkit, CommonMark, Netty, Logback, and more)
  • Bump brace-expansion from 1.1.11 to 1.1.12 in /docusaurus

v0.6.9

  • Issue #725: Langchain4J MCP ToolSpecificationHelper fix
  • Feat: Added support for SSO login (AWS Profile)
  • Feat #741: Add human-in-the-loop for MCP
  • Fix #745: Support IntelliJ Platform version 2025.2

v0.6.7

  • Issue #698: Black panel after "restart" next day
  • Feat #699: Add (or not) current open file in window context (New LLM option settings)
  • Feat #787: Add file" icon should move cursor/focus to "Type to search..." field by default
  • Fix #717: User prompts should rendered as markdown
  • Feat #700: Conversation history returns full conversation
  • Fix #685: Open browser when links are clicked in conversation webview
  • Fix #705: Removed obsolete GitDiff/Merge replaced by MCP
  • Feat #723: Show msg when default file is included in context

v0.6.6

  • Feat #701 : Support for Claude 4

v0.6.5

  • Feat #695 : Support for Grok as frontier cloud model

v0.6.4

  • Fix #690 : Show message when JCEF is not available

v0.6.3

  • Fix #677: Fixed new conversation is immediately added to history
  • Feat #679 : Add “Custom OpenAI HTTP 1.1” toggle for custom OpenAI provider by @denis-kudelin
  • Fix #683 : With Dark theme, light background was used by @mydeveloperplanet
  • Fix #681 : Escape html tags in the response by @mydeveloperplanet
  • Feat #688 : Replaced Google Gemini 2.5 Pro with 05-06 version by @stephanj
  • Fix #677 : Fix for new conversation being immediately added to history by @stephanj

v0.6.2

  • Feat: Improved MCP output in web view

v0.6.1

  • Feat: Appearance settings added so we can customize UI output panel
  • Fix #671 : Copy user prompt, and response and use markdown

v0.6.0

  • Feat: WebView-based response panel with PrismJS for syntax highlighting
  • Feat: Improved code block rendering and copy functionality
  • Feat: Better code syntax highlighting across all languages
  • Feat: Enhanced streaming responses with WebView
  • Feat: Enable MCP servers from input field
  • Feat: Include code snippet or files in context when MCP is enabled
  • Feat: Support MCP in streaming mode

v0.5.12

  • Feat #562 : Fix for horizontal large text responses

v0.5.11

  • Feat #651 : Added gemini-2.5-flash-preview-04-17
  • Fix #655 : DevoxxGenie settings panel blocks UI
  • Feat #657 : Init RAG async
  • Fix #657 : Make RAG process more robust
  • Feat #658: Improve the MCP logging UI/UX

v0.5.10

  • Fix #649 : LMStudio does not return a response

v0.5.9

  • Feat #646 : Support for GPT 4.1, mini and nano

v0.5.8

  • Fix #644 : MCP Functionality Issue on Windows Platform

v0.5.7

  • Fix #545 : Use Bedrock model name with 'us' prefix to make it work 'us.anthropic.claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0'
  • Feat #630 : Update Bedrock model Id with eu,us,apac prefix when using Anthropic, LLama
  • Feat #632 : Stopping a chat which is running doesn't stop the MCP process
  • Feat #635 : Add MCP Envs is same window
  • Feat #638 : Migrated to Langchain4J v1.0.0 beta3
  • Fix #624 : Font size problem in streaming response fixed

v0.5.6

  • Fix #620 : Renamed Google Gemini model to gemini-2.5-pro-preview-03-25
  • Fix #622 : Fix MCP config screen still shows incorrectly the SSE settings

action.description: Add code snippet to context window
Add the selected directory to the context window
Exclude selected directory from Add Project
Copy the selected directory content to clipboard
Calculate the tokens for selected directory
Increase the DevoxxGenie chat output font size
Decrease the DevoxxGenie chat output font size
